summary: A clip showing a screenshot of a long social-media post from an account labeled 'Donald J. Trump' with the handle '@realDonaldTrump', whose text describes a Haitian man released under the prior administration who killed a woman with a hammer, references Temporary Protective Status, judges, deportations and a viewer-discretion warning, signed 'President DONALD J. TRUMP'. Below the text is fixed security-camera footage of a storefront walkway with a 'VAPE CBD' sign, parked cars and cones, time-stamped 04-02-2026, where a person is seen lying on the ground in a later frame. A graphic-content warning applies.

script.scene: A screenshot of a long 'Donald J. Trump' post above a security-camera view of a storefront walkway with a 'VAPE CBD' sign; stamp 04-02-2026.
In the security footage a person is on the ground near the storefront while another person stands nearby.
